chunks.text:
Lakeland Custom Homes LLC — Custom home builder and kitchen remodeling in Burleson. Services:
- Custom home building
- Kitchen remodeling
- Bathroom remodeling
- Home additions
- Whole home renovation

Contact Information:

- Address: 6601 Retta Oaks Dr, Burleson, TX 76028
- Website: http://www. lakelandcustomhomes. com/
- Service Area: Burleson, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 5 stars with 46 reviews.
